# Daily Report — 2026-07-06

## Task Completed
Added `list_on_call_rotations` tool targeting the ServiceNow `cmn_rota` table.
Supports filtering by group name or sys_id (auto-detected), active state, and
rotation name substring. Reference fields (group, manager, schedule, escalation)
are normalised to display values. Results are paginated and ordered by name.
